news_items.headline: 24-26 – deGrom deFeated as Rangers fall 9-6 to Angels
Gerrit Cole's return provides much-needed boost to Yankees' pursuit of AL East crown
news_items.summary: The Yankees saw the return of Gerrit Cole to the mound, and the team's ace looked as good as it gets, considering the veteran right-hander hasn't pitched in the big leagues in nearly 600 days.
